homepage.heroSubline: Stark Fence Co. delivers durable, beautiful fences built to withstand the Arizona climate. Protect your property with our expert craftsmanship and reliable service.
homepage.aboutTitle: Built on Integrity, Rooted in Tucson
aboutText: Stark Fence Co. started with a simple mission: to provide Tucson homeowners and businesses with fences built to last. Founded by lifelong Tucson resident, Mark Stark, our company has grown from a small operation to a team of dedicated professionals, all committed to quality workmanship and customer satisfaction.

We believe in doing things right the first time. From the initial consultation to the final inspection, we prioritize clear communication, meticulous attention to detail, and the use of premium materials. Our goal is to exceed your expectations and deliver a fence that not only enhances your property but also provides lasting security and peace of mind.

Stark Fence Co. is proud to be a part of the Tucson community. We actively support local organizations and strive to contribute to the growth and prosperity of our city. When you choose Stark Fence Co., you're not just getting a fence; you're investing in a local business that cares about its neighbors.

valueProps.title: Durable Materials

services.name: Wood Fencing
services.shortDescription: Classic wood fences for timeless beauty and privacy.
services.description:
Wood fencing is a popular choice for Tucson homeowners seeking a balance of aesthetics, privacy, and affordability. At Stark Fence Co., we offer a variety of wood fence styles, from traditional picket fences to solid privacy fences. We use pressure-treated lumber to resist rot and insect damage, ensuring your wood fence will stand up to the Arizona elements. 

Our wood fence installation process begins with a thorough site evaluation to determine the best placement and design for your needs. We carefully set posts in concrete for maximum stability and use high-quality fasteners for long-lasting durability. We can also customize your wood fence with decorative accents, such as post caps and lattice panels, to create a unique look that enhances your property's curb appeal.

Proper maintenance is key to extending the life of your wood fence. We recommend applying a sealant or stain every 2-3 years to protect the wood from moisture and UV damage. Regular cleaning can also help prevent mold and mildew growth, especially during Tucson's monsoon season. With proper care, your wood fence can provide years of beauty and security for your home.

faq.question: How long will a wood fence last in Tucson's climate?
faq.answer: With proper treatment and maintenance, a wood fence from Stark Fence Co. can last 10-15 years in Tucson.

faq.question: What type of wood is best for fencing in Tucson?
faq.answer: Pressure-treated pine is a durable and cost-effective option for wood fencing in our climate. It resists rot and insect damage.

faq.question: How often should I stain or seal my wood fence?
faq.answer: We recommend staining or sealing your wood fence every 2-3 years to protect it from the sun and moisture.

services.name: Chain Link Fencing
services.shortDescription: Durable and economical chain link fences for security and containment.
services.description:
Chain link fencing is a practical and cost-effective solution for securing your property in Tucson. Known for its durability and low maintenance, chain link is ideal for residential, commercial, and industrial applications. At Stark Fence Co., we offer a variety of chain link fence options, including different gauges, heights, and coatings to meet your specific needs.

Our chain link fence installation process is efficient and reliable. We use heavy-duty posts and hardware to ensure a strong and secure fence. We can also add features such as privacy slats, gates, and barbed wire to enhance security and privacy. Chain link fences are particularly useful around the perimeter of commercial properties, or in areas where visibility is important.

While chain link is inherently low-maintenance, occasional cleaning can help keep it looking its best. We recommend rinsing your chain link fence with water to remove dust and debris. For stubborn stains, you can use a mild detergent and a scrub brush. With minimal care, your chain link fence will provide years of reliable security and containment.

faq.question: How long does chain link fencing last?
faq.answer: A properly installed chain link fence can last for 20-30 years or more with minimal maintenance.

faq.question: Can I add privacy to a chain link fence?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer privacy slats in various colors and materials to add privacy to your chain link fence.

faq.question: Is chain link fencing suitable for pet containment?
faq.answer: Yes, chain link fencing is an excellent choice for containing pets, providing a secure and visible barrier.

services.name: Wrought Iron Fencing
services.shortDescription: Elegant wrought iron fences for security and curb appeal.
services.description:
Wrought iron fencing adds a touch of elegance and sophistication to any property in Tucson. Known for its strength and durability, wrought iron provides a secure and visually appealing perimeter. At Stark Fence Co., we offer custom-designed wrought iron fences to complement your home's architectural style.

Our wrought iron fence installation process involves skilled craftsmanship and attention to detail. We use high-quality materials and welding techniques to ensure a strong and long-lasting fence. We can also customize your wrought iron fence with decorative elements, such as scrolls, finials, and gates, to create a unique and personalized look. In Tucson's climate, it is important to have wrought iron properly coated to prevent rust.

To maintain the beauty of your wrought iron fence, we recommend regular cleaning and painting. Remove any rust with a wire brush and apply a rust-inhibiting primer before painting. With proper care, your wrought iron fence will provide years of security and curb appeal.

faq.question: How much does wrought iron fencing cost?
faq.answer: The cost of wrought iron fencing depends on the design complexity and the amount of material used. Contact us for a free estimate.

faq.question: Does wrought iron fencing rust?
faq.answer: Yes, wrought iron can rust if not properly coated and maintained. We use rust-resistant coatings to protect your fence.

faq.question: Can I customize my wrought iron fence?
faq.answer: Absolutely! We offer a wide range of customization options, including decorative elements and gate designs.

services.name: Vinyl Fencing
services.shortDescription: Low-maintenance vinyl fences for lasting beauty and privacy.
services.description:
Vinyl fencing is a popular choice for Tucson homeowners seeking a low-maintenance and durable fencing solution. Vinyl fences are resistant to rot, insects, and weathering, making them ideal for our desert climate. At Stark Fence Co., we offer a variety of vinyl fence styles, including privacy fences, picket fences, and ranch rail fences.

Our vinyl fence installation process is quick and efficient. We use high-quality vinyl materials and secure installation techniques to ensure a strong and long-lasting fence. Vinyl fences are particularly resistant to the extreme heat and occasional moisture that Tucson experiences.

Maintaining your vinyl fence is easy. Simply rinse it with water to remove dirt and debris. For stubborn stains, you can use a mild detergent and a soft cloth. With minimal care, your vinyl fence will provide years of beauty and privacy for your home.

faq.question: How long does vinyl fencing last?
faq.answer: Vinyl fencing can last for 20-30 years or more with minimal maintenance.

faq.question: Will vinyl fencing fade in the sun?
faq.answer: Our vinyl fencing is UV-resistant to prevent fading and discoloration.

faq.question: Is vinyl fencing environmentally friendly?
faq.answer: Vinyl fencing is recyclable and can be made from recycled materials, making it an environmentally friendly choice.

services.name: Gate Installation & Repair
services.shortDescription: Secure and stylish gates for any fence type.
services.description:
A properly installed and well-maintained gate is essential for both security and convenience. Stark Fence Co. specializes in gate installation and repair for all types of fences in Tucson. We handle everything from simple garden gates to heavy-duty security gates, ensuring smooth operation and reliable performance.

Our gate installation process begins with a careful assessment of your needs and the existing fence structure. We use high-quality hardware and secure installation techniques to ensure a strong and durable gate. We offer a variety of gate styles, including swing gates, slide gates, and automatic gates, as well as custom designs to match your fence and property.

Whether you need a new gate installed or an existing gate repaired, Stark Fence Co. is here to help. We can fix sagging gates, replace damaged hardware, and adjust gate alignment. We understand the importance of a functional and secure gate, and we're committed to providing prompt and reliable service.

faq.question: How much does gate installation cost?
faq.answer: The cost of gate installation depends on the type of gate, the size, and the complexity of the installation. Contact us for a free estimate.

faq.question: Can you automate my existing gate?
faq.answer: Yes, we can automate most existing gates with a gate opener and access control system.

faq.question: What types of gate hardware do you use?
faq.answer: We use high-quality gate hardware designed for durability and security, including hinges, latches, and locks.

services.name: Fence Repair & Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Reliable fence repair services to keep your fence strong and secure.
services.description:
Even the best fences can suffer damage from weather, accidents, or wear and tear. Stark Fence Co. offers comprehensive fence repair and maintenance services in Tucson to keep your fence strong, secure, and looking its best. We handle all types of fence repairs, from minor fixes to major overhauls.

Our fence repair process begins with a thorough inspection to assess the damage and determine the best course of action. We use high-quality materials and proven repair techniques to ensure a lasting repair. We can replace damaged posts, repair broken rails, and fix sagging gates. We also offer fence staining and sealing services to protect your fence from the elements.

Regular maintenance is key to extending the life of your fence. We recommend inspecting your fence regularly for signs of damage and addressing any issues promptly. Stark Fence Co. can provide routine maintenance services, such as cleaning, staining, and hardware adjustments, to keep your fence in top condition.

faq.question: How much does fence repair cost?
faq.answer: The cost of fence repair depends on the extent of the damage and the type of fence. Contact us for a free estimate.

faq.question: Can you repair my fence even if you didn't install it?
faq.answer: Yes, we can repair most types of fences, regardless of who installed them.

faq.question: How often should I have my fence inspected?
faq.answer: We recommend inspecting your fence at least once a year for signs of damage or wear.

reviews.name: Maria G.
reviews.text: Stark Fence Co. did an amazing job installing our new wood fence. The team was professional, efficient, and the fence looks beautiful. It really adds to the privacy of our backyard. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David S.
reviews.text: We needed a chain link fence for our dog run, and Stark Fence Co. provided a great solution at a reasonable price. The installation was quick, and the fence is very sturdy. Exactly what we needed.

reviews.name: Laura K.
reviews.text: The wrought iron fence Stark Fence Co. installed is absolutely stunning! It really elevates the look of our property. The craftsmanship is impeccable, and the team was a pleasure to work with. They handled the desert landscaping concerns perfectly.

reviews.name: Robert P.
reviews.text: Our gate was sagging and difficult to open. Stark Fence Co. came out and fixed it quickly and efficiently. The technician was knowledgeable and friendly. Great service!

reviews.name: Susan L.
reviews.text: We chose vinyl fencing for its low maintenance, and Stark Fence Co. delivered. The fence looks great, and we don't have to worry about painting or staining. The installation team was professional and courteous.

reviews.name: Michael B.
reviews.text: After a monsoon storm, part of our fence was damaged. Stark Fence Co. came out promptly and repaired it quickly and effectively. We were very impressed with their responsiveness and quality of work.
